message:
feat(budget): formalize algebra lemmas + termination proofs (bd-hf5bz)

Add 25 mechanized lemma tests covering the budget algebra:

Meet-semilattice laws:
 - Commutativity (3 variants including None fields)
 - Associativity (2 variants)
 - Idempotency (3 variants: general, INFINITE, ZERO)
 - Identity (INFINITE, left + right)
 - Absorbing element (ZERO, symmetric)
 - Monotone narrowing (poll, cost, deadline)

Termination lemmas:
 - consume_poll strictly decreasing (well-founded)
 - consume_cost strictly decreasing
 - Sufficient budget enables progress
 - Exhausted budget blocks progress
 - Poll termination after exactly q steps
 - Cost termination via chunked consumption

Min-plus / network calculus:
 - Convolution associativity
 - Convolution commutativity
 - Backlog bound monotonicity (arrival)
 - Delay bound monotonicity (arrival)

Each lemma includes a code mapping comment so downstream proofs
(bd-3cq88, bd-2qmr4, bd-3fp4g, bd-ecp8u) can reference them.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
